name: negotiation-rehearsal
description: Generates a counterparty persona from the relationship graph (STUB), runs a short role-play (STUB), then records a debrief artifact. No updates to the real relationship node — the persona is synthetic. See knowledge/product/orchestration/rehearsal-protocol.md.
_migration_note: v2: Typed Flow format (role/produces/consumes). v1 used type + export_as.
